title: Korak 65

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Treba da napravite izraz za if koji proverava da li self i other nisu u istoj klasi objekata.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
node = _Node(_code).find_class("R2Vector").find_function("__lt__").find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[0]
conditions = ["type(self) != type(other)", "type(other) != type(self)", "self.__class__ != other.__class__", "other.__class__ != self.__class__"]
any(node.is_equivalent(condition) for condition in conditions)
`)) })

description: Na isti način koji ste ranije koristili sa __eq__, kreiraj izjavu if koja proverava da li self i other nisu u istoj klasi objekata i vrati NotImplemented.
